day-item/text-default.description: Date number color for Available days.

day-item/text-disabled.description: Date number color for Disable (out-of-month) days.

day-item/text-selected.description: Date number color for Selected days (inverted on dark background).

day-item/bg-selected.description: Background circle color for the Selected day cell (36×36px filled circle).

day-item/border-active.description: Border/active highlight color. TODO: Confirm exact usage in this component.

day-item/indicator-planned.description: Color of the 6×6px dot indicator for days with a planned activity (type=Planned).

day-item/indicator-event.description: Alternative indicator color. TODO: Confirm when this is used vs indicator-planned.

button/secondary/bg-default.description: Background color of the bottom drag handle.

font-family/body.description: Font family for all text in this component.

size/2xs.description: Font size for weekday abbreviation labels.

spacing-4.description: Container padding bottom and gap between calendar wrapper and handle.

rounded-16.description: Border radius applied to the bottom two corners of the container.
